bio_text_1: I'm a Full Stack Developer specializing in building scalable web applications and cloud-native solutions. My work spans enterprise platforms, IoT systems, and high-performance websites, working end to end, from frontend to backend to infrastructure. I take a product-first approach, prioritizing user experience while actively seeking out the edge cases and pain points that cause churn, often before the rest of my team even identifies them. I trace those problems back to their root cause, whether that's scaling bottlenecks, pesky race conditions, or a clunky UI that's driving users away. I've delivered production planning and supply chain features for brewery management software using Angular and .NET on Azure, built real-time IoT data pipelines processing sensor telemetry, and developed responsive client websites optimized for performance and SEO. I don't stop at making things work. I design systems with intention, building solutions that are thoughtful, scalable, and built to evolve.
bio_text_2: ; I'm always up for a chat!
tech_experience_text: I have a wide range of experience with different technologies. Most of my experience is in the JavaScript and .NET Core ecosystems. I also have experience within DevOps more specifically in the Azure ecosystem. I adapt quickly to the technology stack required for a project and don't limit myself to my current domain of experience.
tech_experience_click_hint: Try clicking on a skill to view projects where I have used it
projects_by_tech_text: I don't find skill levels particularly measurable, but I want to provide context into where I've used different technologies. My proficiency is based on real project experience.

bio_text_3b: . The discipline of reading a problem from every angle and thinking it through methodically before ever making a move is exactly the mindset I bring to hard technical problems.
cta_content: Every project I take on I take ownership of.
